titleStmt.title: SII 7.407: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 407. (A.R. No. 196 of 1901). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
+ svasti śrī . pūmevi maruviya tiruppoṉmātu puṇarntu tiṭanmevu kalaimakaḷum nalamperutu ciṟantiruppa vicaiyamikum māmakaḷum velpuyattu viṟṟiruppa IcaivuṭaiyaThe letter ca in icai is engraved below the line.maṭamakaḷum Eṇṭicaitoṟum pukaḻ vaḷarppa pārmuḻutu paraṉiruvar paimpoṉ muṭi paṇintiṟaiñca kaḻinilamakaḷ paṭavam Iṉituvāḻa maṇam puṇarntu
cir vaḷarnta muṭi kavitteṉa cempo ṉaṇimuṭi cūṭi mallai ñālattup palluyurk kellām manuviṉ muṟaineṟi naṭātti Ellaiyi liṉpam yiyalvuṭa(ṉ) ṉeyta Elmati veṇkuṭai niḻaṟṟac ceṅko locci vāḻi pallūḻi yāḻi naṭappac cempoṉ virasiṅndāsa ṉattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripaṟ(pa)marāṉa tiripuvaṉac
cakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku Añcāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇḍa lattu ŪṟṟukkāṭṭukkoṭṭattuThe letter ta in koṭṭattu is incised below the line.tiyākavallivaḷanāṭṭut tiraiyaneriāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻaccaturvetimaṅkalattu tiruvaṉanticcaram Uṭaiyārukku Ivvūṟ cempiyaṉmātevicceriyil Irāccaḷūr cikāḻippiḷḷai Ulakuṭaiyanāya
ṉār kulottuṅ ñ ceyya Iṉnāyaṉārukkut tirumaṭaiviḷākam viṭṭa tirumukappaṭiThe letter ṭi in tirumukappaṭi is incised below the line.tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ koneriṉmaikoṇṭān jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Ūṟṟukkāṭṭukkoṭṭattu tiyākavallivaḷanāṭṭu tiraiyaneri kulottuṅ
kacoḻaccatirvetimaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tiruvaṉanticcuramuṭaiyār Ivvū(r)rile bra tu rājarāja niṉṟu vaṭakkunokki Iraṇṭāñ catira(m) maṟitiyāy Amaṉkavāykkālile Uṟṟa Aṟuttoṭṭi ner nālāṅ kaṇṇāṟ ṟuṟṟa ner Ācaṟitikku meṟkum tenpāṟThe letter n in tenpāṟ is engraved above the line.kellai mummuṭicoḻavāykkālāṉa vaṭakkil maṅkala
l niḷattu pe(r)rerik karaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai nālāṅ kaṇṇāṟ ṟācaṟutikkut teṟkkum Iṉṉān kellaiyuḷ ḷakappaṭṭa Uṇṇilam Oḻiviṉṟi namperāṟ tiruniṟṟuccoḻaṉ tirumaṭaiviḷākaveṉṟutRead ºmeṉṟu.veṟu piṟittu Iṉṉāyanāṟku tirumaṭaiviḷākamāka AñcāvatumutalThe inscription is incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 7.407 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
